_comment_1: pr-autopilot v0.5 — settings snippet to merge into your project's .claude/settings.json
_comment_2: Replace <version> with the installed pr-autopilot version (e.g. 0.5.0).
_comment_3: Replace <your-vault-uuid> with your ExoVault vault id from https://exovault.co.
_comment_4: DO NOT keep the _comment_* keys — they are documentation only. Strip them when merging.
_comment_5: If your project already has hooks defined, merge into the existing 'hooks' object; do not overwrite.

env._comment_env: Required by /pr-autopilot:assign and /finish for ExoVault task mirror. The MCP server picks this up automatically.

hooks._comment: Always-on safety net. Reports if local main or feature-branch base is stale vs origin/main. Does NOT honor allowlist or pause — runs in every session.

hooks._comment_a: Hard gate: blocks Write/Edit outside specs/ unless claim file shows subStatus=implementing|pr_*. Honors pause sentinel + allowlist.

_comment_setup: After merging this into your .claude/settings.json: (1) strip all _comment_* keys, (2) run /pr-autopilot:allow <owner/repo> to enable the autopilot allowlist, (3) optionally set OPENAI_API_KEY (for codex-exec) and CURSOR_API_KEY (for cursor-cloud-agent) in your shell env or in the env block above.
